name: Trustee Election to Allocate Estimated Tax to Beneficiaries

eligibility.description: Election must be made within 65 days after the close of the trust's taxable year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A trustee (or executor of a terminating estate) can elect to treat estimated tax payments made by the trust as having been made by the beneficiaries.
